mapper.select: select s.*, c.name as clazz_name from student s left join clazz c on s.clazz_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into student(name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, violation_count, violation_score, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{degree}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId}, #{violationCount}, #{violationScore}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update student set name = #{name}, no = #{no}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, id_card = #{idCard}, is_college = #{isCollege}, address = #{address}, degree = #{degree}, graduation_date = #{graduationDate}, clazz_id = #{clazzId}, violation_count = #{violationCount}, violation_score = #{violationScore}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select c.name as clazzName, count(s.id) as total from clazz c left join student s on c.id = s.clazz_id group by c.id, c.name order by c.id

select case s.degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end as name, count(*) as value from student s group by s.degree order by s.degree
